channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Orthodox Jewish women in Israel can now take rabbinic exams like men
item.description: For the first time, Orthodox Jewish women in Israel are allowed to take exams to become rabbis, following a long campaign.

item.title: FIFA's World Cup ticket sales spark outrage and investigation
item.description: FIFA's ticket sales for the World Cup have faced scrutiny after prices for the 2026 tournament soared, angering fans.

item.title: Many American households are living on the financial brink
item.description: A new report indicates that nearly half of U.S. households could not afford basic necessities in 2024.

item.title: FBI says former senior CIA officer took home gold bars and millions in cash
item.description: David Rush, a former senior CIA officer, is accused of theft and making false statements. The gold and cash went missing from his CIA storage.
